Haunting Corpse  

Description

1: Summon Skeleton Pet: PCPetNecS05L024Skel2

Details   Raw Spell Data, Lucy Spell View

Mana: 240 Skill: Conjuration
Casting Time: 11 Recast Time: 1.5
Fizzle Time: 1.5 Range: 0
Location: Any Time of Day: Any
Fizzle Adj: 25 Deletable: Yes
Blockable: Yes Focusable: Yes
Dispellable: Yes Interruptable: Yes
Target Type: Self Spell Type: Beneficial
Source: Live 12/03

Messages

Cast on other: Soandso animates an undead servant.

Game Description

Animates an undead servant from the remnants of the fallen. Consumes bone chips when cast.

Reagents

  • Bone Chips x 1

Items with this effect

  • Spell: Haunting Corpse [ID 15493]
  • Spell: Haunting Corpse [crafted]

Quick Facts

Scroll:
Spell: Haunting Corpse
Spell: Haunting Corpse
ClassLevel
NEC24
Expansion:

Duration:
Instant
  • Comments (38)
  • Scroll 2 Sold By (1)
  • Scroll 2 Crafted (1)

Post Comment
Dual Wield
QuoteReply
# Dec 23 2012 at 1:03 PM Rating: Decent
Bophed
14 posts
I tested it today, and this pet can now dual wield. I don't know when it was changed, but I gave him a dagger and a sword. Sure enough he equipped them and during our fights I see Lebitek pierces for x-amount and Lebitek slashes for x-amount.

right arm
QuoteReply
# Mar 16 2008 at 4:42 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591891865862
9 posts
why the hell did SoE make a needed spell for a pet reserch 2 times now i did not get my first root one now i can't get a stinking Lv 24 pet the root ya i understand it but a pet that should nont ever hapen to us, like i said that is are right arm.
▲ Page top
words to be found in OOT
QuoteReply
# Oct 16 2007 at 2:47 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593369910294
4 posts
If one pays attention to posts and actually reads them befor opening there YAP , one will know where to get the Words needed for this particular spell > Haunting Death .... But as a older and mature Necromancer I shall repeat the previous post for you young Bone Heads . Go to Oceans of Tears ( OOT ) and on Irollisi Island one will find all the words needed to make this spell . Also as a Bonus , one can obtain the Semi-Rare drop > Words of Sentient ( Beza ) which also drops on the Island . Just go and destroy all living creatures and reap the rewards . I hope to see the young Dead Heads grow and flurish , and bring Darkness and Pain throughout Norrath !!
▲ Page top
Spell info w/trivia
QuoteReply
# Oct 07 2007 at 4:11 PM Rating: Default
Kepness
210 posts
Spell Research Components: Words of Allure, Words of Detachment, Words of Possession
In: Book of Dark Bindings, Warlock's Book of Binding
Yield: 1
This combine may only be made by Necromancers
Trivial at: 61
Thats it in a nutshell
____________________________
Warrath
Endless Knot
Cazic-Thule
125 Shadowknight
Everquest Player Since 2001

I had Words of Detachment drop for me today from an icebone skeleton in Swamp of No Hope, at the ruins in the middle south of the zone. I posted the /loc under the notes for Words of Detachment.

# Apr 24 2005 at 5:24 PM Rating: Decent

i looked up the spell lists on casters realm and it said that this spell and most of the other research spells can be bought at a vendor but i dont know if this is true or not will someone help me

▲ Page top
Erollisi Island
QuoteReply
# Feb 04 2005 at 12:17 AM Rating: Excellent
Ebelch
View User Forum
626 posts
You can find Words of Allure, Words of Detachment, and Words of Possession after killing a small army of sisters.

The useful thing about hunting on Erollisi Island in your youth (other than the fantastic wealth) is that you will eventually find a copy of Words of the Sentient(Beza).

Words of the Sentient(Beza) our rare words used in your 24th level research only pet buff: Intensify Death.

Irollisi Island can be found in the Ocean of Tears.

Edited, Tue Mar 1 14:51:33 2005
▲ Page top
Over All
QuoteReply
# Nov 03 2004 at 8:36 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591818469142
17 posts
Over all, it's an ok pet spell. Granted, a pain in the butt to get and not required to be gotten. It's not needed, since you get a pet at Lvl. 20 anyways and another one at 29. Mostly, IMO, this spell is for thsoe who jsut find the components in regular play and want it or those who must have every spell in the game for their class.

Damage is ok, about as much as you'd expect from a pet. Casting cost is ok, not too much higher than the Lvl. 20pet.

Overall, it's an ok pet but not one that is necessary to have.
▲ Page top
just buy in
QuoteReply
# Oct 16 2004 at 3:55 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593363412535
3 posts
if you got the money just buy in in the bazaar
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Jul 24 2004 at 10:27 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) THIS IS NOT RIGHT!!! I DONT SEE THE MAGE AND ENCHANTER HAVING TO RESEARCH THEIR PET?!?!?!? MAN JUST PUT IT ON A MERCHANT IN SOME DANGEROUS ZONE SO I CAN GET IT WITHOUT RESEARCHING DANGIT
RE: RESEARCH IS WRONG
QuoteReply
# Oct 10 2004 at 11:04 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1679271392283
Scholar
308 posts
FYI Mages DO have to reasearch their pet, just not at this level. However, for class balancing purposes, look at it this way....each spell level for a few levels, Mages have four pets to research, where you only have the one. So grin and bear it, you don't get as shafted as you thought.

Also, some of your non-research spells are better then any reasearch spells Mages get, so suck it up and play the game the way it's given to you instead of whining about it on Alla. Don't like it? Re-roll as a Warrior.
▲ Page top
pet weapons
QuoteReply
# Jun 29 2004 at 6:30 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591803771907
1 post
just a word of advice if ya want the most from your pet run to bazaar before heading out and get yourself a nice 2h weapon my favorite is a weighty polearm with the 24 pet he can hit all day for 50 with a max that i seen of 58 the polearm you can get em cheap 20pp to 150pp if i cant get 1 for 20pp i get a centi short spear (or something like that)
